'''zawaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacock|seacock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacock|seacock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zawaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæwæhæth|zæwæhæth]] || [[word:zæwæhæj|zæwæhæj]] || [[word:zæwæhæsh|zæwæhæsh]] || [[word:zæwæhæ|zæwæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawawahath|zawawahath]] || [[word:zawawahaj|zawawahaj]] || [[word:zawawahash|zawawahash]] || [[word:zawawaha|zawawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawahath|zawahath]] || [[word:zawahaj|zawahaj]] || [[word:zawahash|zawahash]] || [[word:zawaha|zawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawafhath|zawafhath]] || [[word:zawafhaj|zawafhaj]] || [[word:zawafhash|zawafhash]] || [[word:zawafhaf|zawafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zawahatha|zawahatha]] || [[word:zawahaja|zawahaja]] || [[word:zawahasha|zawahasha]] || [[word:zawahaka|zawahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zawahath|zawahath]] || [[word:zawahaj|zawahaj]] || [[word:zawahash|zawahash]] || [[word:zawaha|zawaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zawahathal|zawahathal]] || [[word:zawahajal|zawahajal]] || [[word:zawahashal|zawahashal]] || [[word:zawahakal|zawahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zawahathatha|zawahathatha]] || [[word:zawahajaja|zawahajaja]] || [[word:zawahashasha|zawahashasha]] || [[word:zawahaka|zawahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zawahathan|zawahathan]] || [[word:zawahajan|zawahajan]] || [[word:zawahashan|zawahashan]] || [[word:zawahakan|zawahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zawahathaoro|zawahathaoro]] || [[word:zawahajaoro|zawahajaoro]] || [[word:zawahashaoro|zawahashaoro]] || [[word:zawahakaoro|zawahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
